package main import ( "fmt" "html" "net/smtp" "strings" ) func BuildFeedbackEmail(fromAddr string, toAddr string, userName string, subject string, feedbackContent string) (emailBody string, err error) { header := make(map[string]string) header["From"] = fmt.Sprintf("<%s>", fromAddr) header["To"] = fmt.Sprintf("<%s>", toAddr) header["Subject"] = subject header["MIME-Version"] = "1.0" header["Content-Type"] = "text/html; charset=UTF-8" htmlBody := fmt.Sprintf(` User Feedback

User Feedback

Username: %s
Subject: %s
Feedback Content:
%s
`, html.EscapeString(userName), html.EscapeString(subject), html.EscapeString(feedbackContent)) var msg strings.Builder for k, v := range header { msg.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s: %s\r\n", k, v)) } msg.WriteString("\r\n") msg.WriteString(htmlBody) return msg.String(), nil } func main() { email, err := BuildFeedbackEmail( "user@example.com", "support@example.com", "Test User", "Test Feedback Subject", "This is a test feedback content with tags.", ) if err != nil { fmt.Println("Error:", err) return } fmt.Println(email) }
